name: Grayscale Ethereum Staking ETF
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview of the Trust and the Shares Grayscale Ethereum Staking ETF (formerly known as Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF) (the Trust) is a Delaware Statutory Trust that was formed on December 13, 2017, by the filing of the Certificate of Trust with the Delaware Secretary of State in accordance with the provisions of the Delaware Statutory Trust Act.
